companyInfo.mainTitle: Your Complete Export Solution for Japanese Vehicles & Parts
companyInfo.description: Established in 2003, we began our journey as a dedicated exporter of used vehicles. In our early years, we built a strong reputation serving markets in Russia, Pakistan, the UK, and the UAE. Over time, we strategically expanded our expertise into the automotive parts sector. Today, we specialize in the bulk export of used vehicles, auto parts, and heavy machinery directly from Japan to a diverse global market, including:
overlay.quoteText: Ready to export your used car parts? Contact us for a personalized quote and expert guidance on container shipping worldwide.
meta.title: Biwako - Used Car Parts Export & Container Shipping
meta.description: Biwako — exporter of used car parts. We dismantle vehicles, load parts into containers and ship containers to ports worldwide.
about.japanDescription: Japan is globally renowned for the exceptional quality, reliability, and affordability of its used vehicles and auto parts. At Biwako International Trading., LTD. we leverage this reputation as your premier export partner. We specialize in a comprehensive range of vehicles—including cars, SUVs, trucks, and buses—as well as heavy machinery such as excavators, forklifts, and cranes. Beyond complete units, we also offer an extensive inventory of high-quality used auto parts, ranging from engines and suspensions to half-cuts and tires. Our service model covers the entire process: sourcing, dismantling, container loading, and global shipping. By managing all Japanese export procedures and documentation, we simplify the purchasing process for international buyers. To efficiently meet customer demand, we are active members of all major auto auctions in Japan and have established strong business relationships with local automobile dealers.
businessFlow.step1.title: Receiving Orders
businessFlow.step1.desc: We get customer orders and check all details to make sure everything is correct.
businessFlow.step2.title: Payment Settlement
businessFlow.step2.desc: Secure payment processing and confirmation before we proceed with order fulfillment.
businessFlow.step3.title: Arranging Cars & Parts
businessFlow.step3.desc: We collect the required cars and auto parts from auctions, suppliers, or our stock.
businessFlow.step4.title: Dismantling & Cutting
businessFlow.step4.desc: Our skilled team carefully dismantles cars and performs half-cut, nose-cut, or full disassembly as needed.
businessFlow.step5.title: Packing
businessFlow.step5.desc: All parts are packed safely to reach the customer in perfect condition.
businessFlow.step6.title: Container Loading
businessFlow.step6.desc: We load cars and parts into containers using methods like full car loading, CKD, rack & tack, or bulk parts, depending on the customer's needs.
businessFlow.step7.title: Shipment
businessFlow.step7.desc: We handle shipping and all documentation, making sure the container reaches the customer safely and on time.
testimonial.quote: “I recently received a container of used car parts from Biwako International Trading Japan, and I am very satisfied with their service. The parts were exactly as described, well packed, and delivered safely. The team handled everything professionally, from sourcing the parts to loading the container and managing the export documents. Communication was clear throughout the whole process. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for reliable suppliers of used auto parts from Japan. Looking forward to doing more business with them.”
testimonial.name: Sergei
faq.partsExport.q1: What types of car parts do you export?
faq.partsExport.a1: We export engines, transmissions, body parts, half-cuts, nose-cuts, and complete vehicle dismantling parts for various car makes and models.
faq.partsExport.q2: Do you provide quality assurance for parts?
faq.partsExport.a2: Yes, all parts are thoroughly inspected and tested before export. We ensure quality standards are met for every shipment.
faq.partsExport.q3: Which countries do you export to?
faq.partsExport.a3: We export to over 50 countries worldwide, including Africa, Asia, Middle East, and other international markets.
faq.partsExport.q4: Can I order specific car parts or models?
faq.partsExport.a4: Absolutely. We source specific parts based on your requirements from auctions, suppliers, and our extensive inventory.
faq.partsExport.a5: Half-cut is the front half of a vehicle including engine and transmission. Nose-cut is the front section with bumper, lights, and radiator assembly.
faq.ordersShipping.q1: How do I place an order?
faq.ordersShipping.a1: Contact us with your requirements. We'll provide a quote, confirm availability, and process your order after payment settlement.
faq.ordersShipping.a2: Shipping time varies by destination. Typically 2-6 weeks depending on the port and customs clearance process.
faq.ordersShipping.a3: Yes, we provide tracking information and regular updates on your container's location and estimated arrival time.
faq.ordersShipping.q4: What container loading methods do you use?
faq.ordersShipping.a4: We offer full car loading, CKD (Completely Knocked Down), rack & tack, and bulk parts loading based on your needs.
faq.ordersShipping.q5: How are parts packed for shipping?
faq.ordersShipping.a5: All parts are professionally packed with protective materials to ensure they reach you in perfect condition.
faq.paymentDocumentation.q1: How do I pay for my order?
faq.paymentDocumentation.a1: We accept wire transfers and other secure payment methods. Specific instructions are provided after a quote is confirmed.
faq.paymentDocumentation.a2: Yes, we prepare and manage all required export documents for smooth customs clearance.
faq.paymentDocumentation.q3: Can I get an invoice and packing list?
faq.paymentDocumentation.a3: Absolutely. We provide detailed invoices, packing lists, and any other documentation required by your importer.
faq.paymentDocumentation.a4: Insurance can be arranged upon request. We can include it as part of your shipping plan.
faq.paymentDocumentation.q5: How do I stay updated on shipment status?
faq.paymentDocumentation.a5: We send regular updates via email and can provide tracking links once the container is loaded.
faq.subtitle: FAQ
overlay.aboutText: We are a trusted used car parts exporter with 22+ years of experience. We dismantle vehicles, source quality parts, and ship worldwide from Japan.
